3183100.name: Buster's Big Score
3183100.description:
Pull off heists in this jazzy fast-paced 2D platformer as legendary(-ish) thief Buster Speedway! Smoothly combine your acrobatic abilities and novelty gadgets to sneak past guards. Slide into the vault to the jewels and hoist your score before making a quick getaway back to your hideout!

Buster Speedway is on a mission to perform the toughest heists of all time to prove he is the World’s Greatest Thief! As always Buster is pursued by his arch-rival Detective Genzo who has vowed to put Buster away for good!

Sneak, Backflip, Dash & Slide to make your way to the safe undetected, then make it back to your hideout avoiding the law with Det. Genzo and his Guard Force in pursuit!

Explore the acrobatic playgrounds of New York, Miami & Paris.

Explore As Well unusual places such as..
  • inside the 90’s internet
  • a 1920’s cartoon
  • an Arctic Base leading to a Lost Island of Dinosaurs hidden deep inside the Hollow Earth!!

No matter how heavily guarded, remote, or conceptually abstract, Buster Speedway can steal it!
